summary: Tested The Factory HKA e-CF integration (new provider alongside Alanube). All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: e-CF toggle, provider selector (Alanube vs The Factory HKA), and 'Probar conexión' button all working correctly. The Factory HKA is currently the active provider with successful sandbox authentication.

endpoints_verified: GET /api/ecf/config - Returns both providers' configuration status
POST /api/ecf/test-connection - Test connection to active provider (The Factory HKA)
GET /api/ecf/dashboard - Dashboard showing all e-CF bills with provider info
GET /api/ecf/logs - Audit logs showing provider for each attempt
GET /api/ecf/status/{bill_id} - Check e-CF status for bills
GET /api/ecf/refresh-status/{bill_id} - Refresh status from The Factory API
GET /api/ecf/logs/{bill_id} - Get logs for specific bill
GET /api/system/config - System config with ecf_provider setting

elements_verified: Alanube provider button (data-testid='ecf-provider-alanube') - FOUND, not selected
The Factory HKA provider button (data-testid='ecf-provider-thefactory') - FOUND and SELECTED
Test connection click - SUCCESS toast: 'Conexión exitosa con The Factory HKA'
Provider selector only shows when e-CF is enabled - VERIFIED

critical_code_review_comments: The Factory HKA integration is well-implemented with proper authentication, payload mapping, and status tracking
ecf_dispatcher.py correctly routes requests to the active provider based on system_config.ecf_provider
NCF counter tracking in ecf_ncf_counters collection prevents duplicate NCF numbers
Frontend SystemTab.js correctly shows provider selector only when ecf_enabled is true
data-testid attributes are properly implemented for all e-CF UI elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Factory HKA e-CF integration is fully functional. Active provider is 'thefactory' with sandbox credentials. Bill 32dfd992 was successfully sent with NCF E310000000103. The ecf_dispatcher.py routes to either Alanube or The Factory based on system_config.ecf_provider. Frontend provider selector in Settings > Sistema tab works correctly with test connection button.
